mapper.sql: id, name, model, serial_no, max_speed_kmh, flight_time_min, payload_kg, battery_mah, ai_score, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM drones
(name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%') OR serial_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q}, '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT
FROM drones
(name LIKE ('%' || #{q} || '%') OR model LIKE ('%' || #{q} || '%') OR serial_no LIKE ('%' || #{q} || '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id FROM drones WHERE serial_no = #{serialNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE drones SET name = #{name}, model = #{model}, serial_no = #{serialNo}, max_speed_kmh = #{maxSpeedKmh}, flight_time_min = #{flightTimeMin}, payload_kg = #{payloadKg}, battery_mah = #{batteryMah}, ai_score = #{aiScore}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
